items.title: BBC visits aftermath of Israeli strike on Lebanon that killed family as IDF targets Hezbollah
items.summary: A relative tells BBC those killed were civilians and not Hezbollah operatives, but the Israel Defense Forces says it was targeting "terrorist infrastructure".

items.title: Trump urges UK and other nations to send warships to Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: The US president says he hopes China, France, Japan and South Korea will also send ships to defend the key oil shipping route.

items.title: Three more Iran football team members change minds over asylum
items.summary: Four of seven members of the women's football delegation who originally sought to stay in Australia have now chosen to return home.

items.title: Markets digest bank earnings after recent turmoil

items.summary: So far this tax season, the IRS has received more than 90 million income tax returns for 2022.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.
